summary: TIER_2: Post-2020 overhaul with continuous OpenZeppelin audits; most recent audit April 2024 (xOGN OpenZeppelin); dependencies on Lido (stETH) and Curve LP pose medium risk.

historical_exploits.name: Origin Dollar Flash Loan Re-entrancy Attack
historical_exploits.details: Attacker used 70,000 ETH flash loan from dYdX to exploit missing validation in mint_multiple function. Attacker passed fake stablecoin under their control, exploiting contract reentrancy. By artificially inflating stablecoin supply, attacker created massive rebase event, inflating holdings to exceed vault assets. OUSD token value plummeted 85% post-attack.
historical_exploits.recovery_actions: Post-incident audits by Trail of Bits and Solidified; protocol overhauled security architecture; multisig governance implemented

severity_findings.issue: OGN buyback code on Uniswap lacked slippage protection
severity_findings.details: Theoretical risk of yield theft via price manipulation; economically unviable given staked token volume; code was disabled immediately

audits.notes: Addressed critical re-entrancy and architectural issues following November 2020 flash loan attack

severity_findings.issue: Chainlink oracle data feeds may be outdated
severity_findings.resolution: Added checks to prevent mints/redeems if oracle stale by specified timeframe

audits.details: 100% of OETH code changes audited before mainnet deployment

audits.findings: Low-severity edge case issues identified; governance transition from veOGV to xOGN well-structured
audits.details: Staking mechanics audited; multiSig timelock governance transition verified

dependencies.name: Lido
dependencies.integration_type: Primary yield source for ETH staking
dependencies.details: OETH derives staking yield from Lido stETH; superOETHb uses bridged Wrapped OETH from stETH
dependencies.mitigation: OpenZeppelin audit covers integration; Lido audited separately by multiple firms

dependencies.name: Curve Finance
dependencies.details: OUSD allocates portion of USDC collateral to Curve StableSwap pools; earns CRV rewards; provides liquidity for OUSD/USDC pair
dependencies.mitigation: Curve audited by Trail of Bits and Quantstamp; yields diversified across Morpho lending and Curve LP

dependencies.name: Morpho
dependencies.details: OUSD deploys stablecoin lending on Morpho protocol alongside Curve LP for yield diversification

dependencies.name: Aerodrome
dependencies.details: superOETHb has protocol-owned concentrated liquidity position on Aerodrome WETH/superOETHb pool; ensures 1:1 peg with ETH

dependencies.name: Uniswap V2
dependencies.details: Legacy swapExactTokensForTokens without slippage protection; function disabled post-OpenZeppelin audit

dependencies.name: dYdX
dependencies.details: Historical exploit vector; current architecture mitigates re-entrancy; OpenZeppelin audits verify protections

governance_and_upgrades.model: Decentralized governance with timelock and multisig

details.token_governance: OGN token holders control protocol upgrades via on-chain proposals
details.timelock: Time-delayed admin actions give users exit window if proposals deemed malicious
details.guardian_multisig: 2-of-8 signature threshold for limited vault operations (depositToStrategy, withdrawFromStrategy, setVaultBuffer, setAssetDefaultStrategy)
details.fast_path: Rebalancing and pause functions can execute without timelock with fewer signers for rapid response to market/security events

governance_and_upgrades.xOGN_governance: April 2024 OGV/OGN merger: control transferred from veOGV to xOGN governance; stakers lock OGN 1mo-1yr for voting weight and reward share

bug_bounty.details: Up to $1M for critical vulnerabilities; rewards scaled by severity and report quality; payouts in OUSD on Ethereum

repositories.name: OriginProtocol/origin-dollar
repositories.description: OUSD and OETH smart contracts; yield-bearing stablecoins

audit_history_summary: 12+ audits over 4+ years; battle-tested codebase; continuous OpenZeppelin agreement covers 100% of OETH/OUSD code changes

significant_risks.details: Lido stETH price volatility affects OETH yields; Curve LP impermanent loss on stablecoin pairs; Morpho lending protocol risk
Super OETH on Base/Optimism introduces Layer 2 consensus and bridge risks; Aerodrome LP dependency on concentrated positions
OpenZeppelin audit identified Chainlink oracle staleness; mitigated by added validation, but oracle ecosystem remains dependency

medium_risks.details: Multisig can trigger fast-path actions without timelock; requires trusted signers
Complex yield strategies across Morpho, Curve, Lido, and Aerodrome increase surface area; audits mitigate but complexity remains

security_strengths: Continuous auditing agreement with OpenZeppelin (100% code coverage)
Multiple independent audits from Trail of Bits, Solidified, Certora
Timelock governance prevents unilateral malicious upgrades
Bug bounty program up to $1M incentivizes responsible disclosure
Transparent security repo with published audit reports
